summary: Comprehensive testing of CIA SERVICIOS iteration 5 features: Super Admin company admin management (edit/block/unblock), CRM followup scheduling, and Client Statement PDF download. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified successfully.

issues: Clipboard permission error when clicking Copy URL button (browser sandbox limitation, not app bug)

backend_apis: Super Admin login rejects invalid credentials
Dashboard returns companies with admin_email, admin_name, admin_blocked fields
GET /api/super-admin/companies/{id}/admin returns admin data with company_name
Company Admin login SUCCESS when not blocked
GET /api/followups/pending returns pending followups with client_name
frontend_flows: Super Admin dashboard shows 4 companies with admin info (email, name, blocked status)
Company dropdown menu shows 'Ver Detalles', 'Editar Admin', 'Bloquear Admin', Activar/Suspender options
Editar Admin dialog opens with form: Nombre, Email, Teléfono, Recovery fields, Nueva Contraseña, Estado actual badge
CRM page shows 'Seguimientos Pendientes' section with pending followup count
CRM Prospecto dropdown shows 'Programar Seguimiento', 'Convertir a Cliente' options
Programar Seguimiento dialog opens with Fecha, Hora, Tipo, Notas fields
Invoices page shows clickable client names (blue links)
Clicking client name opens 'Estado de Cuenta' dialog
Estado de Cuenta shows: Total Facturado, Total Pagado, Saldo Pendiente, Facturas list, Pagos Recibidos list
Estado de Cuenta has 'Descargar PDF' button

seed_data_creation: Test followups created during backend testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: 1) Super Admin can edit company admin (name, email, phone, recovery info, password) via dropdown menu 'Editar Admin'. 2) Super Admin can block/unblock admin via 'Bloquear Admin'/'Desbloquear Admin' dropdown option - dashboard shows 'Bloqueado' badge when blocked. 3) CRM shows 'Seguimientos Pendientes' section and 'Programar Seguimiento' option in Prospecto dropdown menu. 4) Invoices 'Estado de Cuenta' dialog opens when clicking client name, shows financial summary and 'Descargar PDF' button for PDF download.

super_admin_edit_admin.ui: Dropdown > Editar Admin > Form dialog with all fields

super_admin_toggle_admin_status.ui: Dropdown > Bloquear Admin or Desbloquear Admin

crm_schedule_followup.ui: Prospecto dropdown > Programar Seguimiento > Dialog form

client_statement_pdf.ui: Invoice client name click > Estado de Cuenta dialog > Descargar PDF button
